title: YTPMV: We Came, We Saw, We Kicked Its Ass!
description:
HoZKiNZPooP probably doesn't even remember asking me to YTPMV this song.

Yeah so this is one of those fillers I'm famous for uploading too close to my last video for it really to be a filler.

We came
We saw
We came
We saw
We kicked its ass!
We came, we saw, we kicked its ass!
Turning off these machines would be extremely hazardous.
Are you troubled by strange noises in the middle of the night?
You made a date...tonight?
Egon I'm gonna take back some of the things I said about you.
There is no Dana there is only Zuul.
Yes of course, they'll be totally discrete.
Others are just nutballs who come in off the street.
We came, we saw, we kicked its ass!
We came, we saw, we kicked its ass!
We came, we saw, we kicked its ass!
We came, we saw, we kicked its ass!
Outro
We came, we saw, we kicked its ass!
